instructions: If approaching_limit is true and you cannot complete the task, include a 'blocked_report' field in your player report JSON. See autobuild-player.md for the blocked_report schema.

promise_schema_reminder.criterion_id: CORRECT — do NOT use ac_id or id
promise_schema_reminder.criterion_text: CORRECT — do NOT use description or text
promise_schema_reminder.status: must be 'complete' or 'incomplete' — do NOT use done/finished
